35mm lens, f/1.8, medium wide, natural perspective, shallow DoF
anamorphic 40mm, f/2.8, oval bokeh, horizontal lens flare potential

50mm lens, f/2.0, natural compression, slight background separation
28mm lens, f/4.0, deep focus, environment visible and present

INTRUSION.text: 50mm lens, f/1.8, subject isolation, background falls away
85mm lens, f/1.4, portrait compression, maximum background separation
anamorphic 75mm, f/2.0, oval bokeh, compressed perspective, horizontal flares

MECHANISM.text: 35mm lens, f/2.8, observational framing, handheld logic
50mm lens, f/4.0, enough DoF to show environment and subject together

PROOF.text: 100mm macro lens, f/4.0, extreme close-up of surface detail
85mm lens, f/2.8, medium close, clinical sharpness across frame

STAT_REVEAL.text: 100mm macro, f/2.8, maximum detail isolation, background dissolves
50mm lens, f/1.4, subject in sharp focus, world behind out of focus

MOVE.text: 35mm lens, f/2.0, forward motion framing, camera advances with subject
24mm lens, f/2.8, wide to emphasise forward movement and environment opening up

HOOK.text: fast whip pan entering frame, then hard lock — arrests the scroll
sudden smash cut push-in from wide to tight in 1.5 seconds
static for 0.5 seconds, then aggressive slow dolly forward

WEIGHT.text: slow lateral dolly right, camera moving at 0.3m/s, ground level
locked off tripod, subject enters from left and walks toward camera, slightly overhead angle
slow crane descent from overhead to eye level over 4 seconds

INTRUSION.text: slow deliberate push-in, camera closes distance 40cm over 5 seconds, subject fills frame by end
handheld subtle micro-jitter, camera at rest but organically alive, not mechanical
rack focus from soft foreground element to sharp subject at 2-second mark

MECHANISM.text: handheld controlled micro-jitter, observational documentary tracking, camera follows discovery
slow orbital around object or environment element, 180 degrees over 5 seconds
slow lateral pan revealing context from left to right, camera moves at rhythm of information

PROOF.text: locked off, subject or object static, camera perfectly still, evidence speaks alone
very slow dolly-in 20cm total, barely perceptible, clinical observation

STAT_REVEAL.text: static macro, subject perfectly still, light catches surface texture, no camera movement
extremely slow dolly-in 10cm over 4 seconds, macro subject expanding to fill frame

MOVE.text: camera accelerates forward with subject, parallax on background architecture
Steadicam forward tracking following subject, smooth resolute movement, environment opens ahead
slow crane upward revealing scale and forward direction simultaneously

institutional.text: harsh overhead fluorescent 5600K, cold blue-white, flat institutional light, deep shadows beneath subject
practical desk lamp warm 2800K from below left, harsh shadow on right side, chiaroscuro ratio 5:1
single overhead practical tungsten 3200K, pool of light, surrounding darkness, isolation

wealth.text: warm practical ambient 2700K, city lights contributing blue fill from window, balanced 3:1 ratio
soft north-facing window light 6500K diffused through sheer, even and revealing, no harsh shadows
golden hour practical sunlight from left, warm 3200K, long shadows, depth across frame

revelation.text: single motivated source from above-right 3200K, rest of frame intentionally underexposed
backlight rim from behind subject 5600K, face in 60% shadow, information withheld and revealed
mixed light: warm practical left 2800K, cold blue ambient right 6500K, tension in the colour split

documentary.text: available light only, overcast diffused daylight 7000K, no fill, naturalistic
practical sources only: overhead practical fluorescent, monitor glow contributing blue fill

finance_dark.text: Kodak Vision3 500T tungsten stock, slight blue cast in daylight, fine grain, lifted blacks, cinematic toe curve
shot on 35mm, Kodak Vision3 200T, natural skin tones, fine grain structure, professional cinema colour science

finance_warm.text: Kodak Portra 400 colour science, warm lifted shadows, natural saturation, organic grain, photographic not rendered
Fuji Superia 400 colour tone, slight green-teal midtone cast, fine grain, photojournalistic authenticity

high_contrast.text: Kodak Tri-X 400 desaturated grade, high contrast, coarse grain, deep blacks, documentary authority
bleach bypass process simulation, desaturated, increased contrast, silver retention, photochemical grit

cinema_neutral.text: ARRI Alexa 35 colour science, LOG-C3 basegrade, natural tones, subtle grain, professional broadcast standard
Sony Venice colour matrix, cinematic neutrality, excellent shadow detail, film halation on practical lights

finance_institutional.text: glass-and-steel office building interior, evening, city grid visible through floor-to-ceiling windows below
dark wood-panelled banking hall, high ceiling, marble floor, single occupied desk illuminated, all else in shadow
modern open-plan office after hours, overhead lighting half-off, screens glowing, city visible through windows

finance_aspiration.text: penthouse apartment, sparse and expensive, city skyline below, late evening, minimal furniture, maximum space
rooftop terrace with city below, golden hour, distant buildings sharp against pale sky, isolation and scale

finance_street.text: wet London street at night, sodium vapour streetlight reflections in puddles, red brick architecture, deserted
commuter station, off-peak hours, long empty platform, overhead industrial lighting, echo implied

finance_data.text: clean dark surface, single object or document in exact centre, controlled studio negative space
close surface of printed bank statement or official document, edge softly out of focus, cold overhead light

continuity_anchor.text: glass-walled office interior, evening blue-hour, city lights visible below, warm practical overhead
dark professional environment, single warm practical source, evening, muted ambient city light
institutional London interior, overcast ambient, fluorescent overhead, no direct sunlight
contemporary financial environment, evening, controlled cool ambient with warm practical accent
minimal dark environment, one motivated light source, city visible distantly, no clutter

avoid.human: Avoid: facial distortion, extra fingers, hand deformities, morphing skin, eye asymmetry, blink artifacts, warped proportions.
avoid.environment: Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows.
avoid.data: Avoid: readable text on screens, identifiable account numbers, facial distortion, extra fingers, screen flicker, moiré patterns.
avoid.general: Avoid: blur, distortion, oversaturation, smooth waxy skin, plastic textures, over-sharpening, artificial bokeh halos, morphing edges.

authority.text: person in their 40s, experienced, no wasted movement, wearing dark jacket, direct gaze
professional mid-career, unhurried, carrying weight of knowledge, neutral expression that could shift

everyday.text: ordinary person, unremarkable clothes, tired in the way the system makes people tired
person in their 30s, smart but not wealthy, the kind of person who reads the fine print too late

abstract.text: no human subject, object or environment carries the scene

revelation.text: expression neutral to start, subtle brow shift at 2-second mark as comprehension registers, no overacting
controlled stillness, jaw slightly set, the weight of knowing something others do not

authority.text: deliberate pacing, unhurried gaze, each movement communicates confidence not urgency
steady and precise, the expression of someone laying out facts they have long understood

concern.text: slightly furrowed brow, eyes that have calculated something unwelcome, contained not panicked

temporal.text: light quality static throughout, no atmospheric progression
at 3-second mark, distant city light shifts slightly as cloud passes, barely perceptible ambient change
warm practical light flickers once at 2 seconds — power-grid suggestion — then stabilises
steam or breath barely visible in cold air, secondary motion from ventilation barely stirs any fabric
